hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -WindowStyle Hidden -Command "$j = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($j.prompt -match 'notify me when you are done') { New-Item -Path \"$env:TEMP\claude_notify_flag\" -ItemType File -Force | Out-Null }"

powershell -NoProfile -WindowStyle Hidden -Command "$f = \"$env:TEMP\claude_notify_flag\"; if (Test-Path $f) { Remove-Item $f -Force; try { Import-Module BurntToast -ErrorAction Stop; New-BurntToastNotification -Text 'Claude Code', 'Finished — your turn' } catch { [console]::beep(800,200) } }"
